ZEPHYRSQUALL-ALL_OUT.description:
Convert your [gold]Block[/gold] into [gold]Tailwind[/gold].
You cannot gain [gold]Block[/gold].
ZEPHYRSQUALL-ALL_OUT.title: All-Out
ZEPHYRSQUALL-BOOK.title: Book
ZEPHYRSQUALL-BREATHE_DEEPLY.description: Next turn, add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Wind Blast+|Wind Blast}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ZEPHYRSQUALL-BREATHE_DEEPLY.title: Breathe Deeply
ZEPHYRSQUALL-BUILD_MOMENTUM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage a number of times equal to the turn number.{InCombat:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
ZEPHYRSQUALL-BUILD_MOMENTUM.title: Build Momentum
ZEPHYRSQUALL-BURST_OF_SPEED.description:
Cannot be played during extra turns.
Gain {TailwindPower:diff()} [gold]Tailwind[/gold].
ZEPHYRSQUALL-BURST_OF_SPEED.title: Burst of Speed
ZEPHYRSQUALL-CONNECT_THE_DOTS.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add [gold]Honed[/gold] equal to this card's [gold]Honed[/gold] to an Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ZEPHYRSQUALL-CONNECT_THE_DOTS.title: Connect the Dots
ZEPHYRSQUALL-DEFEND.title: Defend
ZEPHYRSQUALL-FAIR_WINDS.description: The next time you take an extra turn, all allies take an extra turn as well.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-FAIR_WINDS.title: Fair Winds
ZEPHYRSQUALL-FLOW_STATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Well Read[/gold]: During your turn, if this is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], immediately play it.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-FLOW_STATE.title: Flow State
ZEPHYRSQUALL-FORETHOUGHT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add [gold]Deft[/gold] {Deft:diff()} to a [gold]Block[/gold] card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
ZEPHYRSQUALL-FORETHOUGHT.selectionScreen: Choose a card to add [gold]Deft[/gold] {Deft:diff()} to.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-FORETHOUGHT.title: Forethought
ZEPHYRSQUALL-FLURRY.title: Flurry
ZEPHYRSQUALL-HARRY.title: Harry
ZEPHYRSQUALL-IMPROVISED_WEAPON.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Permanently decrease this card's damage by {Decrease:diff()}.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-IMPROVISED_WEAPON.title: Improvised Weapon
ZEPHYRSQUALL-KNOWLEDGE_IS_POWER.descript: Whenever you [gold]Overflow[/gold], deal {KnowledgeIsPowerPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-KNOWLEDGE_IS_POWER.title: Knowledge is Power
ZEPHYRSQUALL-KNOWLEDGE_SHIELD.title: Knowledge Shield
ZEPHYRSQUALL-LOST_IN_THOUGHT.title: Lost in Thought
ZEPHYRSQUALL-MAELSTROM.description: Whenever you deal attack damage, deal {MaelstromPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-MAELSTROM.title: Maelstrom
ZEPHYRSQUALL-OBSESSIVE_RESEARCH.descript:
Add a [gold]Lost in Thought[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-OBSESSIVE_RESEARCH.title: Obsessive Research
ZEPHYRSQUALL-ONE_WITH_THE_WIND.descripti: Whenever you gain [gold]Tailwind[/gold], gain an additional {OneWithTheWindPower:diff()} [gold]Tailwind[/gold].
ZEPHYRSQUALL-ONE_WITH_THE_WIND.title: One with the Wind
ZEPHYRSQUALL-OVERTHINK_IT.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] each time you [gold]Overflow[/gold] this way.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-OVERTHINK_IT.title: Overthink It
ZEPHYRSQUALL-PLAN_OF_ATTACK.description: While in [gold]Hand[/gold], your Attacks deal {AdditionalDamage:diff()} additional damage.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-PLAN_OF_ATTACK.title: Plan of Attack
ZEPHYRSQUALL-REPOSITORY.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Can be [gold]Upgraded[/gold] any number of times.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-REPOSITORY.title: Repository
ZEPHYRSQUALL-RESHELVE.title: Reshelve
ZEPHYRSQUALL-STORM_BREWING.description:
Gain {TailwindPower:diff()} [gold]Tailwind[/gold].
Permanently increase this card's [gold]Tailwind[/gold] by {Increase:diff()}{IfUpgraded:show:|, to a maximum of {Limit:diff()}}.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-STORM_BREWING.title: Storm Brewing
ZEPHYRSQUALL-STRIKE.title: Strike
ZEPHYRSQUALL-TOME_SMACK.title: Tome Smack
ZEPHYRSQUALL-WARINESS.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
At the start of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold], put this into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ZEPHYRSQUALL-WARINESS.title: Wariness
ZEPHYRSQUALL-WHET.description: Add [gold]Honed[/gold] {Honed:diff()} to an Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
ZEPHYRSQUALL-WHET.title: Whet
ZEPHYRSQUALL-WIND_BARRIER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {TailwindPower:diff()} [gold]Tailwind[/gold].
[gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the start of your next extra turn.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-WIND_BARRIER.title: Wind Barrier
ZEPHYRSQUALL-WIND_BLAST.title: Wind Blast
ZEPHYRSQUALL-WINDS_FURY.description: The first Attack you play each turn hits an additional time.
ZEPHYRSQUALL-WINDS_FURY.title: Wind's Fury
